Events for RE Professionals

Community Launch

Velocity 2026

May 20-21  |  New Orleans, Louisiana

Two days of education, working sessions, and the events that define this community: FORCE Connect, the Asset Manager Panel, the Five Star Alliance launch, the FSI Offers platform launch, and the Charter Member offer for the first 100 Alliance signups.

Register for Velocity

All Communities

Five Star Conference 2026

September 1-3  |  Dallas, Texas

Every FSI professional community converges at Five Star Conference. Three days of cross-community leadership, education, FORCE Connect, and the industry conversations that define direction. FORCE members receive complimentary registration.
